title: Pega Developer | Contract
description:
Job Scope:
We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Pega Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Pega development, with the ability to independently deliver complex, module-based solutions end-to-end. This role involves applying Pega best practices, mentoring junior team members, and collaborating closely with stakeholders to drive high-quality business solutions.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead the design, development, and deployment of complex Pega modules independently.
  • Ensure adherence to Pega best practices, coding standards, and governance guidelines.
  • Collaborate with business analysts, architects, and stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into robust solutions.
  • Mentor and guide junior developers, fostering knowledge sharing and skill development within the team.
  • Support Pega platform governance, process standardization, and continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues and provide proactive recommendations for process and system improvements.
  • Contribute to RFPs, technical proposals, and client discussions as a subject matter expert (SME).

Job Qualifications:

  • Degree in Information Technology or a related field.
  • 6+ years of hands-on Pega development, with demonstrated expertise in complex module delivery.
  • Have CSSA (Certified Senior System Architect) certification, preferably in Pega version 8.
  • Solid knowledge of Pega PRPC architecture, integration patterns, and advanced features.
  • Proficiency in implementing Pega best practices and delivering high-quality solutions in agile environments.
  • Experience with Pega 8 upgrade projects.
  • Exposure to Pega Deployment Manager.
  • Familiarity with front-end UI frameworks and integration with external systems.
  • Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication skills.
  • Proven ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • Excellent mentoring and team collaboration skills.


Interested candidates can click apply for more information.

** We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. **

We respect your privacy and all communication will be treated with confidentiality.  If you wish to know more about this position or explore other roles, please prepare your updated profile and get in touch with our consultants.

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Rallonza Bernice Mae Nocum | EA License No. 02C3423 Personnel | Registration No. R1442141

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.
